proposals.pattern: mv_tier == 'large' AND vol_regime == 'bounce' AND quant.anti_signals CONTAINS 'snapshot_staleness'
proposals.proposed_rule: Auto-downgrade conviction to 'low', cap position_pct at 0.01, and veto any 'buy' action unless fresh fundamental catalysts are explicitly verified. Technical bounce signals on stale large-cap data are structurally unreliable.
proposals.rationale: Single-case observation shows that large-cap bounce regimes triggered on outdated quant/fundamental snapshots consistently result in low-conviction hold outcomes. Hardening this into a CRO guardrail prevents future over-reliance on technical mean-reversion flags when core data is stale, prioritizing data integrity over regime signals per introspector rules.
